data.title: CareOregon data security breach on Oct 27, 2025, unauthorized access to member info: names, DOB, health plan, Medicaid ID.
data.description: In Portland, Oregon, CareOregon discovered on October 27, 2025, that unauthorized individuals accessed member data. Potentially compromised information consists of individuals' first and last names, date of birth, health plan details, and Medicaid ID numbers.

data.title: Jackson Care Connect reports unauthorized access to member data on Oct 27, 2025, including names, DOB, health plan info, and Medicaid ID.
data.description: In Portland, Oregon, during October 27, 2025, Jackson Care Connect discovered unauthorized access to member information. The compromised data includes individuals' full names, birth dates, health plan details, and Medicaid IDs.

data.title: Unauthorized access to member data at Columbia Pacific CCO discovered on Oct 27, 2025. Information accessed includes names, birth dates, health plan details.
data.description: In Portland, Oregon, on December 26, 2025, Columbia Pacific CCO discovered on October 27, 2025, unauthorized access to member data where individuals viewed sensitive information without consent. The exposed data comprises personal details like first and last names, dates of birth, health plan specifics, and Medicaid ID numbers. The incident underscores the breach in privacy and security, affecting potentially multiple individuals within the database.
BofA’s Vivek envisions a setup where NVIDIA GPUs and Groq’s LPUs are interconnected via NVLink and used together within a single rack.

data.title: MEDIROM partners with world to deploy "Proof of Human" tech in Japan, envisioned by Altman and Blania.
data.description: Rolling out a revolutionary "Proof of Human" infrastructure across Japan, this cutting-edge technology was conceptualized by Sam Altman and Alex Blania. The initiative aims to introduce advanced systems that verify users as genuine humans, thereby enhancing security and trust in online interactions. With a significant investment of [X amount] being allocated towards this project, it is set to transform the digital landscape in Japan and beyond.

data.title: Southpoint Holdings sells 1,000,000 shares (2.93% stake) in Fennec Pharmaceuticals Inc. on Dec. 24, 2025.
data.description: On December 24, 2025, Southpoint Capital Advisors LP, managing funds, sold 1,000,000 common shares of Fennec Pharmaceuticals Inc., equivalent to roughly 2.93% of the total Common Shares available. This decision was made in compliance with securities regulations.

data.title: Parents commonly mention Enchanted Fairies' meaningful experience for kids, emphasizing interaction and engagement in reviews nationwide.
data.description: The article discusses the importance of analyzing patterns in parent reviews when researching children's photography experiences, with Enchanted Fairies being a standout based on tens of thousands of parent reviews. The reviews showcase consistent themes such as the experience being meaningful beyond just photos, feeling like a special event for kids, and emphasizing interaction and engagement with photographers. Parents often mention that the sessions are memorable and create a supportive environment. Overall, the article highlights the positive impact and unique experience that Enchanted Fairies offer to families.

data.title: Stock market slightly down post-Christmas; Nvidia can't boost Dow; Palantir falls below mark.来源: Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Today, the stock market saw a slight decline as the major indexes closed slightly lower on Friday after the Christmas holiday. Nvidia's performance was not enough to boost the Dow, which ended the day in negative territory. Palantir also experienced a drop, falling below a certain benchmark. The live coverage of these events can be found on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Outlook Therapeutics granted 150,000 stock options to two new employees at $2.01 per share.
data.description: In Iselin, New Jersey, on December 26, 2025, Outlook Therapeutics, Inc. revealed that it granted stock options to acquire 150,000 shares of the company's common stock to two fresh employees on December 19, 2025. These options have an exercise price of $2.01 per share. This move was made by the Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors to boost the standard of care for bevacizumab in treating retina diseases. Outlook Therapeutics, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company traded on Nasdaq under the symbol OTLK.

data.title: Wealth tax in California raises concern among billionaires like Peter Thiel and Larry Page, with proposal for statewide ballot in doubt.
data.description: There is uncertainty surrounding the possibility of the proposal making it to the statewide ballot in November. Some affluent individuals such as Peter Thiel and Larry Page, who are billionaires, might not be inclined to take the chance.

data.title: Bitmain cuts ASIC prices during mining industry unrest with deals for operators as 2025 closes on a tough note for crypto.
data.description: As the year 2025 comes to a close, the crypto market and mining industry face challenges. To support mining operators during this tough period, various discounts and bundle deals have been introduced. These offers aim to provide relief in the face of market downturns and uncertainties. It is hoped that these initiatives will help mining operators navigate the current situation and continue their operations despite the unfavorable conditions prevailing in the industry.

data.title: Immersion Corp. received a Nasdaq delinquency notice for late Form 10-Q filing; alert was received on December 23, 2025.
data.description: Aventura, Florida - Immersion Corporation, a prominent provider of haptic technologies traded under the symbol IMMR on Nasdaq, disclosed on December 23, 2025, that it received a notification letter from Nasdaq. The letter highlighted that the company failed to submit its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the fiscal quarter concluding in October. This delinquency compliance alert, also known as the "10-Q Nasdaq Notification Letter," was issued by Nasdaq's Listing Qualifications Department.

data.title: Brookfield Real Assets Income Fund Inc. (NYSE: RA) declared Q1 2026 distribution with monthly payouts for January, February, and March.
data.description: On December 26, 2025, Brookfield Real Assets Income Fund Inc. (NYSE: RA) revealed the declaration made by its Board of Directors stating the monthly distributions for the Fund for January, February, and March 2026.

data.title: Tesla aims for $3 trillion valuation by 2026 according to analyst Dan Ives, labeling it a "defining year".
data.description: An analyst at Wedbush, Dan Ives, has identified 2026 as a crucial year for Tesla stock. He anticipates the company could reach a valuation of $3 trillion in that year. Ives has outlined essential milestones for investors to monitor regarding the performance of the Elon Musk-led company.

data.title: AGI updates on MCTO; following NP 12-203 guidelines. TSX: AFN (AGI) reports to regulator MSC. News reported on Nov 28, 2025.
data.description: In Winnipeg, Manitoba, Ag Growth International Inc. (TSX: AFN) is issuing an update on its default status report as per National Policy 12-203 regarding the management cease trade order (MCTO). Following the news release on November 28, 2025, the Manitoba Securities Commission approved. AGI is complying with the guidelines amidst these circumstances.

data.title: Elon Musk predicts a post scarcity economy with no poverty or hunger, forecasts triple-digit growth within 5 years.
data.description: Elon Musk, the CEO of Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA), has frequently shared a bold vision for the future global economy, proposing that a "post-scarcity" era is imminent, leading to the eradication of poverty and the obsolescence of labor. The TSLA stock is currently experiencing movement. Musk recently took to social media to express his belief that the implementation of "applied intelligence" could result in economic growth in double digits in the short term and potentially triple digits within five years. He stated, "Double-digit growth is expected within 12 to 18 months. With applied intelligence driving economic progress, triple-digit growth could be feasible in approximately five years." For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Cycurion, Inc. (NASDAQ: CYCU) corrects dividend distribution ratio to 0.0080 from 0.0180 in $500,000 common share dividend.
data.description: On December 26, 2025, Cycurion, Inc. (NASDAQ: CYCU) issued a corrected press release regarding a dividend distribution ratio. Initially announced at 0.0180 on December 11, 2025, the correct ratio is 0.0080. This adjustment accounts for common shares that may be issued through the exercise of warrants linked to a recent private placement closure on December 5, 2025. The pro-rata distribution involves roughly $500,000 worth of CYCU shares to be distributed to shareholders on a fully diluted basis. This correction ensures accuracy in the distribution process, with all other dividend terms and conditions remaining unchanged.
